reviews.review_text: Steam COD games are malware and allow hackers direct access to your pc. not to mention they are still making you  pay 60$ for games that came out 14+ years ago.

When it comes to zombies...
BO3 is hands down the best of the series in my opinion.
Especially with the custom maps that's been created by the community.
Also much appreciated that they brought the old maps back as well.
And ofcourse the iconic 4! Dempsey, Nikolai Richtofen and Takeo ^^
bring back memories from my child hood glad that it was add so me and the bois can time travel back to the good ol days on our days off.
Good game took me through hard times (ive had over 5k hours on xbox and playstation before switching to pc)

I LOVE this game. But ♥♥♥♥ this company for keeping these games up on the store, while they are literally unplayable online, and having the audacity to charge full price that I payed over a decade ago.

Their entire operation needs to get delisted off the platform.
if you are trying to play regular multiplayer dont even try it says 50 available matches and immediately drops to 0 only buy this game if you are interested in the zombies
Cant join friends lobbies. Malware giving, super gay, super stupid game. Waste of time and money.

Best game to play with Zombie mode with friends and the workshop maps.
The campaign is mid and kinda okay if played in coop.
Multiplayer is basically dead.

For 20 bucks on sale it's a good choice (even though it should be even lower, it's a 10 year old game at this point...)

This is more of a warning than a review, if you do buy this game, PLEASE play with a 3rd party launcher to keep yourself safe from modders, [b][u]EVEN IF YOU ARE PLAYING OFFLINE![/u][/b]

[b]There have been reports of RCE (Remote Code Execution) being done through this game and the 3rd party launchers help mitigate those attacks. If you do not feel comfortable using them, then don't buy this game on PC. Your best bet is on Xbox One/Series or above or Playstation 4/5 (DDoS attacks and mods still happen on PS4/5 due to jailbroken players, just not as bad, but on Xbox Series or PS5, you are pretty safe, as its regarded as the best official way to play online. Look for "A Complete Guide on How to Play Black Ops 3 in 2026" by iSpetsnazZx on reddit for more info.)[/b]
game is unplayable without a client or community patch to play it safely without getting hacked, even when you are offline.

It's insane how after 11 years as well as focusing on modern CODs, Treyarch still decide to screw this game over by adding some awful update nobody asked for. Not only did nobody ask for this but said patch also broke things such as T7Patch as well as most other community made patches. Maybe focus on making a game that doesn't make me wanna gouge my eyes out

Almost 11 years after release and I'd only recommend this pending 2 of 3 conditions:
[olist]
[*]If you're picking this up with Zombie Chronicles for <$20 
[*]You are interested in the wealth of community made custom zombies maps.
[*]You're looking to relive some nostalgia.  
[/olist]
The campaign was meh even when the game launched, there are better modern campaigns to experience. The multiplayer is malware, T7 Patch is a must. The 120+ gbs of storage isn't justified in 2026 (I have 8tb total ssd space). Unless you're dying to relive some has-been CoD experience this is a comfortable skip (hopefully you've played this back in the day and aren't stuck in the past).
the beast game ever zombie and the mutiplayer and the campine

I can't really comment on the campaign or the zombies anymore since I haven't played them since I had the game on Xbox back in the day when it came out. But the multiplayer is a lot of fun and a bit addictive. I really enjoy the freedom of movement. The only downside to this game is that the servers can be a bit crazy sometimes with hackers running around, but it is still very playable without too much hassle. Definitely make sure to pick up a patch if you're going to play online. Also, don't pay the full price they ask for—wait for it to go on sale.

compromised/unsafe game without community patches (safer than the older games but stuff can still happen), broken mp server, costs too much even if you're buying on sale after over a decade
cannot recommend, only bought it during a sale for zm

This is probably the best Call of Duty game. The zombies mode in this game is great and the mods are fun. Campaign isn't too great, but the multiplayer is good. I would recommend buying this game if you like fps games.

An aesthetic that cannot be achieved in modern gaming. This game has one of my favourite campaigns of all time in terms of combat, love all the abilities and gadgets that make this game not just a simple shooter. I used to play this game when i was a kid and it's fun playing it again. I'm kind of disappointed with the fact that 3 slaps from a zombie kills you in the zombies gamemode, how does that make any sense? Maybe it's because I'm used to cold war's big health bar as I used to play it a lot a couple of years ago but I hate having to worry that while shooting a bunch of zombies one zombie will creep up behind me and kill me in seconds. All the zombies maps are really cool and show that you had a lot of passion put into them but it's just way too hard and ruins it for me.

This is the best black ops + call of duty game ever made, let me start..
Omni-movement, excellent graphics, rare to find hackers.
Its a cherry on the top for me, there is no single reason for me to hate a single bit of this game.

The best COD in history, but why the unnecessary updates?

This is hands down the best Call of Duty ever made, but I’m honestly confused why they are releasing updates in 2026 for an 11-year-old game.

The latest update did more harm than good—it broke several custom maps and mods that the community worked hard on, and the hackers are still present anyway. It feels completely unnecessary to mess with a game that is kept alive solely by its dedicated fanbase and the Steam Workshop.

Please stop breaking the game we love. Unless it’s a real security fix, just leave this masterpiece alone and let us enjoy the custom content.
Got it on sale for custom zombies. If you wanna play safe you gotta do an easy extra step and it is all good. But this game shouldn't be full price still after 11 years. Buy it on sale.

Confusing campaign and a multiplayer that if it isn't dead is full of cheaters, but Zombies mode is why you buy any of these games after Black Ops 2 anyway.

[spoiler] in conclusion: train go boom. [/spoiler]
Best game i have played in months playing with friends on this game is top ten fun things i have ever done

Best COD ever made, this review is for zombies only since its the only mod i played so i cannot rate neither multi neither campain since i played almost nothing multi and never even started campain, but for zombies its the best with 5 different map, plus 9 old map remastered, every map is cool and its better than the last, and the remasterd and are top notch, i would give this game 10/10 only for this but if u add to it the fact that u can have an almost infinite number of modded map from the workshop and this include the full remaster of every map but tranzit (that is still a work in progress) from BO2, BO1 and WAW that were not added by treyarch with even so many original map as good as official maps, challeng maps too to test ur skill and if u want even brainrot map, this game really has everything u could wish for, the only downside i can find is the fact that u can load only 1 mod at a time without external help. this mean that if u have a mod that add a gun and one that change the HUD u have to choose only one, and with Wonderweapons mods that are really cool and a lot of HUD mods with old and new cods HUD to chose is an evil choice to give to the players
10/10
I have played the game enough for a accurate review but zombies is pretty fun ig.

Campagin - not gud 

Multiplayer - infested and not safe to play 

Zombies on the other hand! is great the mod scene has given me hours of great fun and the base game content with chronicals and dlc maps are fricken sweet. 

Honestly play zombies and youll have a jolly time

multiplayer- in its prime it was goated now if you dont have a plugin and stuff its unplayable
zombies - the best zombies in all of cod
campaign- ass

first off, I've played this title on every released format except for macOS. Solid game, optimization could use work. im running a fairly low end all-in-one pc and i havent tried the campaign to the best of memory but regular multiplayer doesnt run well in various ways... some of which i can chalk up to unstable internet. zombies is definitely where BO3 excels and is playable even on low end pcs and i have prestiged in zombies and yeah it works great just with some occasional crashes but again.... low end pc. i did get this specific copy on sale along with the season pass, think it was like $20 and i consider it well worth it just for zombies.
good but not worth 60$+ for a 11 year old game that's infested with cheaters
One of the best games made in recent years, campaign was abysmal but train go boom. Zombies best ever made and multiplayer awesome when it launched. Highly recommend
Very fun maps are great best part about this game is the invisible zombies it'll spawn in to say a ♥♥♥♥ a u and end the run EE are amazing 10/10
Custom zombies and the community keeps everything alive... still better than anything new.

This remains the top Call of Duty game. Not because it's the absolute best of the Black Ops Duo. Because it's not. In fact, I wouldn't even really call it a Black Ops game in anything but name only. But because with the workshop function you can play. The maps from the other games. Which is genuinely the only reason to buy it. If you love zombies, there's no reason not to buy this one.

Multiplayer is very unplayable in this time since the game is now 10 years old and overrun by hackers, I would recommend trusting the T7Patch so you could have the performance boost you need and also the safety for you when playing online solo or with a friend, its a very easy patch to do. I mostly do Zombies which the custom maps are available in the steam workshop for endless experience, there are also amazing mods that overhauls the game like AAE (Does not work on heavily modded maps), I use Vanilla+ for those modded maps.
Great game for playing with friends. The custom maps make it my number 1 game of all time.

Even though this game is considered dead nowadays in the midst of 2026, this game has been relatively close to my heart, I remember the times I played this game with my friends back when it was released. Multiplayer was fun with the considerable amounts of special operatives and new guns compared to Black Ops II. WE DO NOT TALK ABOUT THE CAMPAIGN because it was ass lmao. Most of the people nowadays are now playing Zombies often playing mods, or Shadows of Evil and D.E. (Ngl I would nowadays lol) I would say this game was basically the golden age of Zombies, either Black Ops II or III. I would say I spent WAY too much on this mode as it's very addicting. 7/10.
Awesome game, especially on Steam as it lets me play custom Zombies maps which are cool as always
Such a good game, i would recommend getting into zombies easter eggs theyre so much fun
cult classic for the zombies alone, multiplayer was good too from what I remember of it. they do not make them like they used too. Custom Zombies is a HUGE W too

At this point the only reason to play BO3 is for zombies. We all know BO3 was never the best zombies game COD released, but by them including mod tools with the game it let thousands of people express their creativity through custom zombies and even pvp gamemodes! Some of the mods added to the workshop are better than what Treyarch released. Since they took the initiative to include mod tools I think this COD game specifically deserves praise for that.

cod bo3 is really good for an older game really fun with friends or if your lonely go in to zombies with some randoms and custom maps for zombies is really fun, multiplayer is a bit to competitive but I prefer zombies and I would recommend to other people and players.

This game is somehow two console generations behind and still walking modern AAA titles on a leash.

The graphics may look like they were assembled during a power outage, but the community is still out here keeping this thing alive like it owes them money. Custom maps, mods, and ways to play with friends make this game feel less “old” and more “undead in the best way possible.”

Modern games launch with 200GB updates, broken servers, battle passes, and the emotional stability of a wet paper bag. Meanwhile, this ancient masterpiece just shows up, lets the community cook, and somehow delivers more fun than half the new titles trying to charge you $70 for a glorified loading screen.

The fact that people are still making maps and mods for it says everything. This game should be in a retirement home, but instead it’s outside beating younger games with a folding chair.

10/10. Old, ugly, and somehow still him.

Greatest Call of Duty of all time, Custom zombies alone makes this game S tier. The multiplayer is one of the most engaging and fun ive had throughout all the call of duty's and the official zombie maps are just magical. Now moving on to the bad, the only negative thing about this game is the campaign which was very weak compared to other titles in the series. Still Black Ops 3 holds up and out does every game to come after it. Its pretty telling when you got a game over 10 years old thats more populated than some of the newer titles in the call of duty series. Even the micro transactions weren't bad in this game, you could earn weapons and sick skin through supply drops just by playing the game without the need of spending $20 - $40 on skin bundles which is a joke.

Black Ops III on PC is basically two different games: the official content… and the real reason people still play it — Custom Zombies. The modding scene is massive, creative, and still active in 2026. If you enjoy Zombies, this is easily one of the best purchases you can make on PC.

That said, the base game is way too expensive at full price. It’s nearly a decade old, and most players are here for the Workshop maps, not the original campaign or multiplayer. BO3 goes on sale often, and that’s when it becomes a fantastic deal.

If you do pick it up, install the T7 Patch (by Scropts and Serious) via Scropts github. It fixes engine issues, improves performance, removes old limitations, and makes Custom Zombies run smoother and more reliably. Honestly, it’s the version the game should have shipped with.
One of the best games of all time, custom zombies has provided over a decade+ on longevity. Campaign and MP were alright.
This game is literally Satan incarnate for multiplayer. Zombies is fine but if you wanna play multiplayer you'd have a better time using a cactus as a ♥♥♥♥♥♥♥ buttplug.

Fun Call of Duty game one of the best in my opinion. But I recommend using a patch to make sure you don't get hacked while playing. Naturally on steam this game lacks the right security to keep you safe from people who might want to hack you, but you can easily solve that with a patch. Currently using CleanOps, super easy to use. Literally drag and drop and you are done. But there is a few other patches you can pick from just look them up.

The recent update to the game has broke multiplayer for Zombies Only two people can play online in one party Any more than that and the third person gets booted out crash disconnected when playing with somebody with a steam deck my other friend has said that he has no issues playing with other Windows players but whenever we try to play with a friend that has a Steam deck the game doesn't like more than two people playing This wasn't the case before their recent update to the game So it's sad to see that they broke this game for online for the zombies

Besides MW2019, Black Ops 3 is one of the last great Call of Duty games before it fell off. While it is the third black ops it continued to build off of unique ideas and pushed the envelope compared to the recycled AI slop that Activision puts out now. The specialist system was really fun, the movement was unique and refined and the campaign was engaging but not quite memorable. Huge respect to Treyarch for making one of the only Call of Duty games with a Steam workshop option. 

What makes this game so special is the community and the never ending zombies and multiplayer content. I can spend hours customizing weapon skins, playing custom maps, having fun with friends, running unique experiments and endless game modes with avaliable mods. One of the most fun PvE experiences out there and the community continues to deliver important patches and exciting new content. BO3 Forever.
good zombies mode, but the fact that this game is still full price after more than a decade and that hackers can use RCE exploits to ♥♥♥♥ up your PC is awful
fun to play with friends and also if you're lonely you can play mods by yourself or with friends.

BO3 offers the best CoD zombies experience after 11 years partly due to Zombies Chronicles and Workshop support, if you do plan on getting the game I'd wait for a sale and use either T7patch or BO3Enhanced if you want to play multiplayer
This Game Is Really Fun especially the zombies the only problem is cheaters in normal multiplayer lobbys
This game is so good it makes my ♥♥♥♥ tingle I 100% recommend this game to anyone new to either the call of duty or black ops franchise.

absolutely amazing game only 14 been playing this game since i was at least 7 years old zombies is amazing campaign is good multiplayer is good( even though its lowk dead now) even the zombies playing to round 100 just for the love of the game is amazing
this game is the accual definition of edging, one second youll be on round 401030461576 and then get hintone singular time with no widdows web and then lose your best run
best zombies in quite some time game is a 10/10 for me came from console to pc just to play all the custom maps
Zombies alone is worth the price of this game. From the base game maps, to Zombies Chronicles, to incredible modded maps, BO3 has the best overall zombies experience in Call of Duty.

Black Ops 3 is easily one of the best Call of Duty games. Zombies is the best part of the game by far, especially with modded maps and all the custom mods people made for it. You can spend hours on it without getting bored. Multiplayer and other modes are pretty dead now, and even zombies isn’t as active as it used to be, so it feels more like a solo game these days. Still 100% worth buying on a discount if you love zombies.
good game lots of  fun worth buying definetly more fun with friends but not that you have any if your reading this. buy the game. mods are super fun too.
played this on the playstation before getting it on steam. this will forever be the best call of duty in my opinion.
Black ops 3 is amazing and the mods and modding community keep it alive and well
fun game to play with friends. Has great workshop content
its the best thing closest to the classics of waw and bo1. smoothest gameplay
The Multiplayer/Zombies is 10/10. Honestly the workshop mods alone was worth every penny I paid for this game
might be an old game but its lwk still fun to play with friends

Positives:
- Works perfectly on the Steam Deck.
- Best zombies experience in the entire franchise.
- Custom zombies maps through the Workshop are amazing and much simpler than modding. 

Negatives:
- Campaign is really weird, it honestly doesn't even feel like COD.
- Multiplayer is full of hackers. If you want to play multiplayer, I recommend playing the console version instead.

Just join a public Shadows of Evil match and hope for the best.
This game has the best zombies mode besides BO2. Some zombies have bigger pp's than others, which is always okay! But i love this game so much. I recommend!!!
W game, W story (for zombies), generally good unless you choose perkaholics over the margwa pounding you
this game is good for people that like playing zombies games and multiplaer type shooter games even though its a little bit of a older game its still fun to play

Forever my beloved Zombies game, Having the workshop is unbeatable. Bring it back!!
Amazing game,zombies is the best it's ever been,but campaign is meh and 60 euro for a ten year old game is crazy

The single player campaign sucks, the zombies campaign sucks even harder and the multiplayer is dead (it wasn't that great either way). However Black Ops 3 has by far the best zombies mode of all the games, with workshops maps you have almost infinite content to keep playing.

don't buy this

This has the best zombies ever because on pc you can get TONS of maps and that is what i love a lot. The zombie chronicles was such a smart idea and is very nostalgia especially kino and origins.
great game, works well on any pc due to its age. Worth it if u want to have great time
I never ended up clicking with the new class and movement mechanics. It felt a bit cluttered and got in the way of the gunplay, which I did like. I'd pick a different CoD.

campaign mid af, zombies is the best ever, you got zombie chronicles, you got the new maps like shadows of evil, tweaks and over all improvements to the engine, multiplayer is good, just make sure to get the T7 patch so it's actually safe to play ONLINE, and then the steam workshop feature legit makes this the best and somewhat the last good Call Of Duty
This game is way better playing with friends its more comfortable

I can only offer my recommendation for the zombies mode, it's some of the best the series has ever offered. The workshop is nothing to sneeze at either. Other than that, I can't really recommend the campaign or multiplayer, so just wait for it to be on sale if you want it, and understand you're basically just buying a zombie game.
game is literally unplayable without t7 patch and it has poor maintance and i wouldnt recommend getting it anymore in 2026 its not worth it for even 20 euros on sale in my opinion
best zombies game oat, my favorite call of duty of all time and overall a good experience
Played this game since i was a kid, recently bought it on pc and started playing the zombies maps again, really fun game especially zombies mode

This is probably the best COD game. It's fun and I really like the story, the maps too are really well made and designed. There aren't just the usual multiplayer battle royal game mode. There's the zombies and the arcade, campaign and even a gun game, and so much more. Playing this games on friends is really fun on computer and console and will give some cool moments.
Absolutely amazing game. 10/10 I believe everyone should play this atleast once in life

when me bought game me think of zombie, me like zombie. so me boot up zombie and realized, zombie scary. so me run away from zombie and didnt know how to shoot so me go down and round over. tough game more tough den elden's rings
custom zombies is S tier on BO3 and I'll never understand why in newer zombies they don't focus on having tools for the community to create the maps we truly deserve

Great game, probably my favourite COD Zombies game to date. A shame about the hacked lobbies where hackers give you 100% in basically everything, including achievements. I've told Steam and Activision about this but there's nothing they can do :/

until they fix security issue you pc could get bricked without mods if you just want a solo or coop experience on zombies yeah go for it but it irks me that any random doofus could brick my pc bc he didnt like that I took the lightning staff
public games sucks especially trying to do shadows easter egg dont play this game, save your mental health
very fun one of the most thought out call of dutys out there besides the campaign other than that it has a great multiplayer and zombies is one of the best out there
Great game from Call of Duty, they never made a bad one yet! Story Mode and Multiplayer are good but the Zombies Mode with Steam Workshop is what makes the game a flawless 10/10!
really fun to see on a good pc and the custom maps make it more fun to play with if you have friends

Well I bought it wanting to play it, especially the classic zombies. There is a few patches you can and should install for your safety but i had issues trying to install the patch the game or steam didn't want to add the files for the game but still ran the game (I'm not techy techy but i couldn't search or see the files anywhere). I ran into a lot of issues just trying to protect myself from hackers to the point i thought it wasn't really worth playing. A lot of people don't have an issue and that's fair but i just lost the will to play the game in the end. I do recommend the game though but only with proper patches installed. You can also play it fully offline without the patch but you should take steam offline and disable any network connections on your device, you basically don't want any way for a stranger to join you.

best call of duty zombies overall. you get goated maps + the old ones from black ops 1 and an unlimited amount of custom made maps by the community which is still active and you can download them all for free. 11/10
This is the definitive way to play bo3 zombies. The mods are a real gamechanger and would recommend to buy especially on sale.
Bought it a couple days ago to relive memories and it feels so good to play again.
